Yamaha A-series disk image and sampler object tooling


axklib [OPTIONS] [SUBCOMMANDS]


OPTIONS:
  -h,     --help              Print this help message and exit
          --version           Display program version information and exit

SUBCOMMANDS:
  info                        summarize supported axklib containers
  objects                     decode current sampler objects as JSON
  relationships               resolve sampler object links as JSON
  inventory                   decode object inventory through the model
  coverage                    summarize current relationship coverage
  corpus                      run corpus-level workflows
  extract                     extract data from supported containers
  orphans                     classify physical waveform ownership as JSON
  validate                    validate container and sampler organization
  create                      create a fresh sampler container
  alter                       alter an existing sampler container
